notes:
- Right-click "Send to Friend" now opens the main window so you can actually see the file going out
- The window closes itself when the send finishes, and stays open if anything fails so you can see what went wrong
- Fixed the "Sending to friend..." text getting stuck on a failed send
- Clearer error messages when something goes wrong (instead of "Internal server error")
- The close button red now reaches the corner cleanly
- Files are no longer uploaded to our servers based on predictions, only the ones you actually send
